{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "FAQPage",
  "mainEntity": [{
    "@type": "Question",
    "name": "What are the Benefits of Addiction Detox Services at Cottonwood Tucson",
    "acceptedAnswer": {
      "@type": "Answer",
      "text": "Cottonwood’s fully staffed clinic is offered as part of our comprehensive residential rehab program. Detox plays several key roles in the early part of recovery, including:

Physical stabilization. The primary goal of detox is to break the physiological cycle of addiction by purging your body of harmful chemicals that build up during substance abuse. Clients should pay special attention to nutrition and hydration during this time, and the Cottonwood staff will assist with this.
Emotional & psychological preparation. Beyond physical discomfort, clients begin to experience mental and emotional upheaval during detox. Cottonwood’s therapists and staff are here to support you during this time, and we will walk with you as you prepare and motivate yourself for the next phase of your sobriety journey.
Stand-Alone Medical Detox Program
While we encourage clients to experience the benefits of our residential alcohol and drug addiction treatment programs after detox is complete, Cottonwood Tucson also offers medical detox as a stand-alone program option. Call (888) 727-0441 to inquire about this option.

Begin Your Medical Detox Services Today in Arizona
From your first phone call to the aftercare process, Cottonwood Tucson provides caring, compassionate support throughout your sobriety journey. Ask our admissions team about medical detox services for men or women, or submit a confidential online contact form. A member of our Tucson addiction treatment team will be in touch promptly."
    }
  },{
    "@type": "Question",
    "name": "What is a Medically Managed Detoxification at Cottonwood Tucson",
    "acceptedAnswer": {
      "@type": "Answer",
      "text": "Medically Managed Detoxification
At Cottonwood Tucson addiction rehab, recovery from alcoholism or drug addiction usually begins with medical detoxification. When a person has been using alcohol or other addictive substances (benzodiazepines, opiates,  heroin, oxycodone, etc.), they are likely to develop a physiological dependence. And if that person abruptly stops drinking or using they may, within hours of their last use, develop serious and life threatening withdrawal symptoms. No one should ever attempt to detoxify from alcohol or any other mood-altering substance without professional medical supervision.

The Comfortable Medical Detox Process
At our Tucson detox, medically managed detoxification consists of consultation with a medical provider, close nursing supervision, the regular monitoring of vital signs, and a medication protocol to manage the physical distress of withdrawal and guard against potentially injurious withdrawal symptoms.

Cottonwood Tucson has eight medical detox beds, each located near a nursing station with 24/7 staffing. Our team of clinicians, nurses, and credentialed addiction specialists provide a safe, comfortable detox environment. During their stay, clients also receive nutritional support and have access to holistic therapies such as yoga, Tai Chi, and meditation classes.

Many individuals also come to our medical detox and addiction rehab with chronic and complex health needs. In our fully staffed clinic, we provide medical management of these issues. Our on-site doctors and nursing staff provide necessary medical intervention, 24 hours a day"
    }
  }]
}
</script><link rel="icon" href="https://cottonwooddetucson.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/07/cropped-CottonwoodOGP-1-32x32.jpg" sizes="32x32" />

style="padding-bottom: 0px ;"  ><div class="gdlr-core-text-box-item-content" style="text-transform: none ;color: #373737 ;"  ><p>At Cottonwood Tucson, we understand that the first step in <a href="https://cottonwooddetucson.com/addiction-treatment/">recovering from drug</a> or <a href="https://cottonwooddetucson.com/addiction-treatment/alcohol/">alcohol addiction</a> is often the most physically and emotionally demanding. That’s why we offer 24/7 medically managed detox services in Tucson, Arizona, designed to support patients through a safe, comfortable withdrawal process under expert medical supervision.</p>
<p>Whether you’re detoxing from alcohol, opioids, benzodiazepines, heroin, or <a href="https://cottonwooddetucson.com/addiction-treatment/prescription-drug/">prescription medications</a>, our experienced clinical team provides round-the-clock care, tailored medication protocols, and integrative therapies to ease symptoms and prepare you for long-term recovery.</p>

Medical Detox in Tucson, Arizona 

 Cottonwood's Health Services 

 
 

Safe, Supervised Withdrawal at Cottonwood Tucson 

At Cottonwood Tucson, we understand that the first step in recovering from drug or alcohol addiction is often the most physically and emotionally demanding. That’s why we offer 24/7 medically managed detox services in Tucson, Arizona, designed to support patients through a safe, comfortable withdrawal process under expert medical supervision.

Whether you’re detoxing from alcohol, opioids, benzodiazepines, heroin, or prescription medications , our experienced clinical team provides round-the-clock care, tailored medication protocols, and integrative therapies to ease symptoms and prepare you for long-term recovery.

Why Choose Our Medical Detox Center in Tucson? 

 Detoxing without medical support can be dangerous and, in some cases, life-threatening. At Cottonwood Tucson detox center , we offer a medically supervised environment where patients can stabilize physically and begin healing mentally and emotionally. Our program is ideal for individuals looking for: 

 

Alcohol detox in Arizona

Opioid and prescription drug detox

Standalone detox programs with optional transition to residential treatment 
 

 Support for co-occurring health conditions during detox 

 

 

 Our facility is located just outside of Tucson in the tranquil Sonoran Desert, offering privacy, comfort, and a natural setting for healing. 

What Is Medical Detox? 

 Medical detox is a structured process in which individuals are gradually and safely weaned off addictive substances under the care of licensed professionals. Detoxification is more than just physical withdrawal, it’s the foundation for all subsequent stages of recovery. 

 What We Treat: 

 

 Alcohol 
 

 Benzodiazepines (e.g., Xanax, Valium) 
 

 Opiates and opioids (heroin, oxycodone, fentanyl) 
 

 Methamphetamines and cocaine 
 

 Synthetic drugs (spice, bath salts) 
 

 Prescription medications 

 

Tucson’s Most Comfortable Medical Detox Experience 

 At our Tucson detox facility , we take every step to ensure your safety and comfort: 

 

 24/7 Medical Supervision: Our detox beds are located near a fully staffed nursing station. 
 

 Vital Signs Monitoring: Regular checks to assess stability and prevent complications. 
 

 Medication-Assisted Treatment (MAT): Carefully managed withdrawal with evidence-based medication protocols. 
 

 Private Detox Rooms: Eight dedicated beds designed for rest and observation. 
 

 

 On-Site Medical Clinic: Our doctors and nurses manage chronic or co-occurring medical issues throughout detox. 

Holistic Detox Support: More Than Just Medication 

 Healing isn’t just physical, it’s emotional, mental, and spiritual. That’s why our medical detox program in Tucson incorporates integrative wellness services to support whole-person recovery: 

 

 Nutrition & Hydration Support – Registered dietitians create personalized meal plans to restore brain and body balance. 
 

 Movement & Mindfulness – Patients participate in yoga and   meditation  to support emotional regulation and reduce withdrawal stress. 
 

 

 Therapeutic Support – Licensed counselors and therapists help patients process the emotional impact of early sobriety and prepare for the next phase of treatment. 

Detox Benefits at Cottonwood Tucson 

 Our medical detox program is more than a clinical service, it’s a compassionate introduction to healing. Here’s what patients can expect: 

 1. Physical Stabilization: Detox breaks the physiological dependence on substances and clears harmful toxins. Our team ensures hydration, proper nutrition, and medical balance as your body begins to heal. 

 2. Emotional & Psychological Preparation: Detox can trigger mood swings, anxiety, and emotional trauma. Cottonwood’s integrated approach provides mental health support and therapeutic tools to prepare you for rehab. 

 3. Tailored Transition to Residential Care: Many clients choose to continue into residential addiction treatment following detox. Our staff will help guide your transition with personalized treatment planning. 

Standalone Medical Detox Program Available 

 While most patients continue into our residential program, we also offer standalone medical detox in Arizona for individuals who need only a medically supervised withdrawal phase. This option includes: 

 

 Full access to medical and clinical staff 
 

 Holistic services during your stay 
 

 Aftercare planning and referrals upon discharge 

 

 Call (888) 727-0441 to learn more about standalone detox options. 

Begin Your New Life in Recovery Today. 

 Let Us Help You Get Started. 

 (888) 727-0441 Verify Your Insurance 

 
 
 
 
 

 

 

 

 (888) 727-0441 

 

 Our Location 
 

Cottonwood Tucson

4110 West Sweetwater Drive

Tucson, AZ 85745

rawMentions: Medical Detox

Located near Tucson International Airport, we have a wide variety of programs and services, including our residential program, medical detox, veterans program , family program , and outpatient services , making us a destination for those seeking mental health and addiction treatment across the country.

More than 20 million Americans struggle with substance use disorders, often requiring professional care such as detox , holistic treatments , individual therapy , and group therapy to achieve lasting recovery.
Medical Detox Services
Our Medical Detox program in Arizona provides safe, supervised withdrawal management for individuals beginning their recovery journey.
Led by experienced medical professionals, our detox services are tailored to each client’s needs.
From inpatient detox to virtual IOP, we meet patients wherever they are in their recovery journey.

On-Site Medical Clinic: Our doctors and nurses manage chronic or co-occurring medical issues throughout detox.
Holistic Detox Support: More Than Just Medication
That’s why our medical detox program in Tucson incorporates integrative wellness services to support whole-person recovery:
Detox Benefits at Cottonwood Tucson
Our medical detox program is more than a clinical service, it’s a compassionate introduction to healing.
Physical Stabilization: Detox breaks the physiological dependence on substances and clears harmful toxins.
Emotional & Psychological Preparation: Detox can trigger mood swings, anxiety, and emotional trauma.
Tailored Transition to Residential Care: Many clients choose to continue into residential addiction treatment following detox.
Standalone Medical Detox Program Available
While most patients continue into our residential program, we also offer standalone medical detox in Arizona for individuals who need only a medically supervised withdrawal phase.
Call (888) 727-0441 to learn more about standalone detox options.

rawMentions: Residential Treatment

Located near Tucson International Airport, we have a wide variety of programs and services, including our residential program, medical detox, veterans program , family program , and outpatient services , making us a destination for those seeking mental health and addiction treatment across the country.
Residential Program
Welcome to Cottonwood Tucson, an inpatient holistic health center licensed to treat mental health and substance use disorders .
At our inpatient rehabilitation center in Tucson, Arizona, we treat a wide range of mental health disorders, as well as drug, alcohol, and various process addictions.

CAP (Cottonwood Assessment Program) is a 5-day intensive inpatient addiction and/or mental health assessment program providing a comprehensive evaluation that will focus on the specific needs of the individual in our addiction treatment center.

Cottonwood is clear on the front end that treatment is the start of a lifetime of work and that additional treatment is needed whether that is extended residential, intensive-outpatient, meetings, or individual counseling.

Cottonwood’s intensive outpatient program and partial hospitalization programs in Tucson, Arizona, are designed to build the skills needed for long-term addiction recovery or mental health treatment when residential treatment has been completed or is not necessary.
Being ready to step down from a residential or PHP program or step up from weekly individual or group outpatient treatment.

Partial Hospitalization Programs are designed to provide intensive treatment while bridging the gap between inpatient and outpatient care, ideal for those needing comprehensive care but don’t require 24-hour supervision.
Cost-Effectiveness: Outpatient programs are generally more affordable than inpatient treatment, making them accessible to more individuals.
Residential Treatment Program
Our Residential Treatment Program offers 24/7 care in a structured, supportive environment to promote healing and long-term recovery.
Our team is ready to help, whether you need residential treatment, outpatient services, or a personalized care plan for our mental health, alcohol, and drug abuse treatment program.
The Cottonwood Assessment Program (CAP) is a five-day intensive inpatient evaluation tailored for individuals with complex mental health or substance use concerns.
From inpatient detox to virtual IOP, we meet patients wherever they are in their recovery journey.

Tailored Transition to Residential Care: Many clients choose to continue into residential addiction treatment following detox.

Outpatient Services for Addiction Treatment & Mental Health
Intensive Outpatient Program & Partial Hospitalization Program
What Are Outpatient Services?

Our outpatient substance abuse treatment and mental health services encompass a variety of treatment programs that allow individuals to receive care while living at home or in a supportive environment.
Outpatient rehabilitation services are ideal for those who do not require intensive supervision or medical detoxification .
Types of Outpatient Rehabilitation Services
There are two primary types of outpatient services for drug and alcohol addiction treatment and mental health treatment :
Intensive Outpatient Programs (IOP)
What Are Intensive Outpatient Programs (IOP)?
Intensive Outpatient Programs are designed to provide comprehensive treatment while allowing individuals to maintain their daily lives.
Unlike traditional outpatient rehab, IOPs offer a more intensive level of support, making them ideal for those who need more than periodic counseling.
Intensive Outpatient Program participants typically attend several hours of structured individual and group therapy sessions multiple times a week.

Partial Hospitalization Programs are designed to provide intensive treatment while bridging the gap between inpatient and outpatient care, ideal for those needing comprehensive care but don’t require 24-hour supervision.
Our Tucson, Arizona, Outpatient Services

rawMentions: Our IOP and PHP Programs are NOW OPEN.
Intensive Outpatient Program & Partial Hospitalization Program
Intensive Outpatient Programs (IOP)
What Are Intensive Outpatient Programs (IOP)?
Intensive Outpatient Programs are designed to provide comprehensive treatment while allowing individuals to maintain their daily lives.
Intensive Outpatient Program participants typically attend several hours of structured individual and group therapy sessions multiple times a week.

Cottonwood’s intensive outpatient program and partial hospitalization programs in Tucson, Arizona, are designed to build the skills needed for long-term addiction recovery or mental health treatment when residential treatment has been completed or is not necessary.
A Virtual Intensive Outpatient program can be a beneficial option for many reasons.
Outpatient Services: PHP and IOP in Tucson, Arizona

Going beyond the level of support offered in traditional support groups, IOP and PHP groups are led by Master’s-level therapists and support staff who have extensive experience in mental health treatment and addiction recovery.
Engaging in IOP/PHP gives participants better long-term outcomes by preparing them to manage their own mental health and substance use disorders.
Our Cottonwood Virtual IOP is designed for those with mental health, substance use, or co-occurring disorders.
Here are some highlights of our Virtual IOP:
Qualifications for admission to the Cottonwood Tucson Virtual IOP program include:
While a Virtual IOP is a great option, it may not be for everyone.
Whether you need structured outpatient care or the flexibility of our Virtual IOP, we are here to support your journey.

Our Partial Hospitalization (PHP) and Intensive Outpatient Programs (IOP) in Tucson, Arizona, offer flexible, structured outpatient treatment for individuals needing continued support but who do not require 24-hour care.
Our Virtual Intensive Outpatient Program delivers the same high-quality care as in-person IOP through a secure, online platform.
Outpatient Treatment Services (PHP & IOP)
Virtual IOP (Online Treatment)

Designed for those who need flexible access to treatment in Arizona and nationwide, our Virtual IOP includes live group therapy, individual counseling, and ongoing support from licensed clinicians – all from the comfort of home.
Virtual IOP
From inpatient detox to virtual IOP, we meet patients wherever they are in their recovery journey.

rawMentions: We have been working with co-occurring disorders and dual diagnosis for more than 20 years and have a wide variety of experience in the treatment of complex and difficult issues.
Co-Occurring Disorders
CO-OCCURRING TREATMENT .
We provide assessment and treatment of all co-occurring disorders.
Our Cottonwood Virtual IOP is designed for those with mental health, substance use, or co-occurring disorders.
This is called co-occurring disorders : when a mental health issue affects a substance use disorder , and vice versa.
Co-Occurring Disorders Treatment
Support for co-occurring health conditions during detox
On-Site Medical Clinic: Our doctors and nurses manage chronic or co-occurring medical issues throughout detox.

rawMentions: Located near Tucson International Airport, we have a wide variety of programs and services, including our residential program, medical detox, veterans program , family program , and outpatient services , making us a destination for those seeking mental health and addiction treatment across the country.
FAMILY PROGRAM .
Cottonwood’s Family Program provides a structured, safe space, allowing all family members to find their own healing and recovery.
Family therapy
Beyond personal and peer support, family therapy plays a crucial role in the healing journey.
Family Program for Addiction and Mental Health Recovery
Our Family Program is designed to educate, support, and empower loved ones throughout recovery.
Family Program
